import regex as re

# Arabic normalization function
AR_DIACRITICS = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')  # includes vowels and Quranic marks
TATWEEL = '\u0640'
PUNCT_REGEX = re.compile(r'[\W_]+', re.UNICODE)  # matches non-word; but will also remove Arabic letters? \w includes underscores/digits/letters; in Unicode, \w includes Arabic letters?
# Let's make custom: remove punctuation (not Arabic letters, numbers, whitespace)
PUNCT = re.compile(r'[^\p{L}\p{N}\s]')

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if not isinstance(s, str):
        return ''
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, '')
    s = AR_DIACRITICS.sub('', s)
    # unify alef forms
    s = re.sub(r'[أإآٱ]', 'ا', s)
    # unify hamza on waw/ya maybe? Keep hamza separate?
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ء','')
    # ya & alef maqsura
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')  # unify ya
    # ta marbuta to ha? maybe unify to h or to ta? We'll map ة->ه for normalized?
    s = s.replace('ة','ه')
    # remove punctuation
    s = PUNCT.sub(' ', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

query_full = "وَمَن يَقُلْ لِوَليٍّ هَذَا عَقِدَ لِيَ عَلَيْهِمْ عُقْدَةً مِنَ اللَهِ"
query_norm = normalize_arabic(query_full)
query_norm

# Build normalized ayah list
ayahs = []
for a in quran:
    text = a['ayah_text']
    norm = normalize_arabic(text)
    ayahs.append((norm, text, a))
len(ayahs)

# compute best 20
scored = []
for norm, text, meta in ayahs:
    s = ratio(query_norm, norm)
    scored.append((s, meta['surah_id'], meta['ayah_id'], norm, text, meta))
scored_sorted = sorted(scored, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)[:20]
[(round(s,3), m['surah_name'], ayah, norm[:80]) for s, sid, ayah, norm, text, m in scored_sorted]

def token_f1(candidate, query_tokens):
    c_tokens = candidate.split()
    # compute precision/recall over set or multiset? We'll use set match counts min
    from collections import Counter
    c_count = Counter(c_tokens)
    q_count = Counter(query_tokens)
    inter = sum((c_count & q_count).values())
    p = inter / (sum(c_count.values()) + 1e-9)
    r = inter / (sum(q_count.values()) + 1e-9)
    if p + r == 0:
        f1 = 0.0
    else:
        f1 = 2*p*r/(p+r)
    return f1, p, r, inter, sum(c_count.values()), sum(q_count.values())

best_f1 = []
for norm, text, meta in ayahs:
    f1,p,r,inter,cl,ql = token_f1(norm, q_tokens)
    best_f1.append((f1,p,r,inter,cl,ql, norm, text, meta))
best_f1_sorted = sorted(best_f1, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)[:20]
[(round(f1,3), meta['surah_name'], meta['ayah_id'], inter, norm[:80]) for f1,p,r,inter,cl,ql,norm,text,meta in best_f1_sorted]

# Build normalized hadith matn/hadithTxt fields
hadith_entries = []
for h in hadith_db:
    text = h.get('Matn') or h.get('hadithTxt') or ''
    if not isinstance(text, str):
        text = str(text)
    norm = normalize_arabic(text)
    if norm.strip() == '':
        continue
    hadith_entries.append((norm, text, h))
len(hadith_entries)

# Score hadith

[(round(s,3), norm[:80]) for s, norm, text, meta in scored_h_sorted]
